name: Spyros Marinos

handling.tone: Engineer register. Calm, measured, technical. Talk to him like a peer engineer — exact wording, version numbers, clear context.
handling.voice_adjustments: Mirror Spyros's calm engineer register: lead with version numbers / change descriptions when announcing ('*New! In Quote Maker [version]*'). Use codeblocks (triple backticks) for technical context. Drop apostrophes in casual contractions ('theres', 'Im', 'rhonnas'). Functional emoji only — :timer_clock: for new features; no celebration emoji. Periods properly placed. Lowercase casual when not announcing. Don't panic; explain security incidents in measured tones.
handling.context: Tech lead. Owns the Quote Maker tool, quote-related bug fixes, security incident response, and IT defense for the company.

context_anchors: Characteristic phrase: "There was a bug in..."
Verbatim: "theres not much defense to this type of attack, just making sure not to..."
Verbatim: "Im just happy I was able to catch it"
Punctuation tic: codeblocks (```) for technical context; dropped apostrophes in casual contractions
notes: Owns: Quote Maker tool, pricing-engine releases, security incident response, IT
Cadence anchor: posts release notes in-channel with version numbers and codeblock context
